mainEntity.name: What makes Laxmi Edible Oils different from other brands?

acceptedAnswer.text: Laxmi Edible Oils partners with small-batch wood-press mills across Rajasthan and tests every batch in our in-house lab for purity, FFA, moisture, and adulteration before shipping to customers.
Yes, we ship our wood-pressed oils across India. Standard delivery takes 4-6 days, and we provide QR code tracking for every bottle.

mainEntity.name: What types of oils do you offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: We offer wood-pressed mustard oil (Kachi Ghani), filtered groundnut oil, refined soyabean oil, and light sunflower oil - all sourced from Rajasthan's best mills.
Yes, every batch of oil is tested in our Jaipur lab for purity, FFA content, moisture levels, and potential adulteration before it reaches customers.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer B2B bulk orders?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we provide bulk orders for businesses, restaurants, and hotels. Contact us through our B2B page or WhatsApp for custom pricing and requirements.
